creator: yvan.vanhullebus@netasq.com
text:
On Tue, Nov 11, 2008 at 09:30:18PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net/scapy,

Hi.


> Please note that PR ports/128802 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/128802

Patch construction looks a bit strange, and I had to move some files
by hand after patch applied (mostly contents of files/).
But without that problem, patch is ok for me.


Yvan.

-- 
NETASQ
http://www.netasq.com
